metadata.title: Ohlone Language Master Database
metadata.description: Consolidated database of all Ohlone language varieties
metadata.license: Database code: MIT. Dictionary content: CC BY-NC 4.0 (Warner et al.). Community content: respect tribal sovereignty.

phrases.english: We are Muwekma Ohlone (we speak our language)

phrases.phrase: Makkin Mak Non wente Mak Hoise Muwekma Noono
phrases.english: We speak in our beautiful Muwekma language
